summary: Completed testing of References section overhaul - image-based cards with contractor support, 'Näytä lisää' functionality, and admin panel enhancements. All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/references returns list with new fields (cover_image_url, main_contractor, location, year, is_published)
GET /api/references returns 6 sample references with images and contractors
GET /api/settings includes references_subtitle, references_title, references_initial_count_desktop (4), references_show_more_text ('Näytä lisää')
GET /api/admin/references (authenticated) returns all references including unpublished
POST /api/admin/references creates reference with new fields successfully
References section displays as 2-column grid on desktop (md:grid-cols-2)
Reference cards show cover image with 4:3 aspect ratio
Reference cards display project title (h3), service type (primary color), Pääurakoitsija, and location
Only 4 references shown initially on desktop (matches references_initial_count_desktop setting)
'Näytä lisää' button appears when there are more than 4 references
Button text changes to 'Näytä vähemmän' after expanding
Clicking 'Näytä vähemmän' collapses back to 4 references
Admin panel References tab shows all 6 references with thumbnails
Admin reference edit form has all new fields: Projektin nimi, Palvelutyyppi, Pääurakoitsija, Sijainti, Kuvakuva (Kansi), Vuosi, Julkaistu
Admin Global Settings has 'Referenssiosion asetukset' section with display settings
Global Settings includes: Näytä aluksi (desktop), Näytä aluksi (mobiili), 'Näytä lisää' checkbox and text settings
seed_data_creation: 6 sample references already seeded with contractors (NCC, Skanska, YIT, Hartela, Lehto, Peab) and cover images
context_for_next_testing_agent: References section feature complete. 6 references with images and contractors. 2-column grid on desktop. 'Näytä lisää' button working correctly - shows 4 initially, expands to 6, collapses back. Admin panel has full reference management with new fields (cover_image_url, main_contractor, location, year, is_published). Global Settings has references section display options. All APIs working correctly.

admin_panel.references_tab: Shows all 6 references with thumbnails, contractor, and location
